name: HTTP Request
description: Complete HTTP client with events system - GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE with event listeners

blocks.name: HTTP GET
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; let headersObj = {}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const requestId = Date.now() + '-' + Math.random(); const eventData = { id: requestId, type: 'http_get', url: url, status: 'start', timestamp: Date.now() }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent = window.__dispatchHttpEvent || function(event) { if (window.__httpEventListeners) { window.__httpEventListeners.forEach(listener => { try { if (listener.type === event.type || listener.type === 'onAny') { listener.handler(event); } } catch(e) { console.error('Event listener error:', e); } }); } }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onRequestStart' }); fetch(url, { method: 'GET', headers: headersObj }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window[target] = data; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onResponse', status: 'success', data: data, target: target }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'success', data: data }); }).catch(e => { console.error('HTTP GET failed:', e); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onError', status: 'error', error: e.message }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'error', error: e.message }); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP POST
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const requestId = Date.now() + '-' + Math.random(); const eventData = { id: requestId, type: 'http_post', url: url, body: bodyObj, status: 'start', timestamp: Date.now() }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent = window.__dispatchHttpEvent || function(event) { if (window.__httpEventListeners) { window.__httpEventListeners.forEach(listener => { try { if (listener.type === event.type || listener.type === 'onAny') { listener.handler(event); } } catch(e) { console.error('Event listener error:', e); } }); } }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onRequestStart' }); fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window[target] = data; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onResponse', status: 'success', data: data, target: target }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'success', data: data }); }).catch(e => { console.error('HTTP POST failed:', e); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onError', status: 'error', error: e.message }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'error', error: e.message }); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP PUT
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const requestId = Date.now() + '-' + Math.random(); const eventData = { id: requestId, type: 'http_put', url: url, body: bodyObj, status: 'start', timestamp: Date.now() }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent = window.__dispatchHttpEvent || function(event) { if (window.__httpEventListeners) { window.__httpEventListeners.forEach(listener => { try { if (listener.type === event.type || listener.type === 'onAny') { listener.handler(event); } } catch(e) { console.error('Event listener error:', e); } }); } }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onRequestStart' }); fetch(url, { method: 'PUT', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window[target] = data; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onResponse', status: 'success', data: data, target: target }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'success', data: data }); }).catch(e => { console.error('HTTP PUT failed:', e); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onError', status: 'error', error: e.message }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'error', error: e.message }); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP PATCH
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const requestId = Date.now() + '-' + Math.random(); const eventData = { id: requestId, type: 'http_patch', url: url, body: bodyObj, status: 'start', timestamp: Date.now() }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent = window.__dispatchHttpEvent || function(event) { if (window.__httpEventListeners) { window.__httpEventListeners.forEach(listener => { try { if (listener.type === event.type || listener.type === 'onAny') { listener.handler(event); } } catch(e) { console.error('Event listener error:', e); } }); } }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onRequestStart' }); fetch(url, { method: 'PATCH', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window[target] = data; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onResponse', status: 'success', data: data, target: target }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'success', data: data }); }).catch(e => { console.error('HTTP PATCH failed:', e); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onError', status: 'error', error: e.message }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'error', error: e.message }); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP DELETE
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; const target = '${b.getValue('target')}'; let headersObj = {}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const requestId = Date.now() + '-' + Math.random(); const eventData = { id: requestId, type: 'http_delete', url: url, status: 'start', timestamp: Date.now() }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent = window.__dispatchHttpEvent || function(event) { if (window.__httpEventListeners) { window.__httpEventListeners.forEach(listener => { try { if (listener.type === event.type || listener.type === 'onAny') { listener.handler(event); } } catch(e) { console.error('Event listener error:', e); } }); } }; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onRequestStart' }); fetch(url, { method: 'DELETE', headers: headersObj }).then(r => { if (!r.ok && r.status !== 204) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); const data = r.status === 204 ? { deleted: true, status: 204 } : r.json(); return data; }).then(data => { window[target] = data; window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onResponse', status: 'success', data: data, target: target }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'success', data: data }); }).catch(e => { console.error('HTTP DELETE failed:', e); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onError', status: 'error', error: e.message }); window.__dispatchHttpEvent({ ...eventData, type: 'onComplete', status: 'error', error: e.message }); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP Event Listener
blocks.scopeVars: (b) => [{ name: b.getValue('targetVar') || 'httpEvent', range: 'event handler', color: '#aa88ff', desc: `Event data from HTTP request - contains type, url, status, data/error` }]
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const eventType = '${b.getValue('eventType')}'; const urlPattern = '${b.getValue('urlPattern')}'; const targetVar = '${b.getValue('targetVar')}'; const handler = function(eventData) { window[targetVar] = eventData; const matchesPattern = urlPattern === '*' || eventData.url.includes(urlPattern.replace('*', '')); if (matchesPattern) { ${(b.handlerBlocks || []).map(child => child.export?.javascript ? child.export.javascript(child) : '').join(';\n')} } }; window.__httpEventListeners = window.__httpEventListeners || []; window.__httpEventListeners.push({ type: eventType, pattern: urlPattern, target: targetVar, handler: handler }); })();`
